plan.title: Posterior Strength & Weighted Intervals
plan.focus: Barbell deadlift foundation followed by a weighted vest and bike conditioning blend.

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 2 sets: 5 empty Barbell Deadlifts focusing on hinge movement

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Deadlift — 5 sets x 5 reps @ moderate weight (rest 120 sec)
Seated Dumbbell Lateral Raises — 3 sets x 15 reps @ 15-20 lbs (rest 60 sec)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: EMOM 20 (Every Minute on the Minute for 20 minutes):
Minute 2: 45 seconds Weighted Vest Walk (Treadmill at 3.0-3.5 mph, 3% incline)

plan.title: Anterior Strength & BikeErg Intervals
plan.focus: Lower body push and seated vertical press paired with metabolic conditioning

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: World's Greatest Stretch — 5 reps per side

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Back Squat — 4 sets x 8 reps @ moderate weight (rest 90 sec)
Seated Barbell Overhead Press — 3 sets x 10 reps @ moderate weight (rest 60 sec)

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: 1 min DB Goblet Squats (25 lb DB — Continuous Movement)

plan.title: Upper Body Push & Weighted Vest Conditioning
plan.focus: Horizontal push strength and steady-state weighted cardio

sections.name: Warm-Up
exercises: 2 rounds: 10 Push-ups, 15 Seated Scapular Retractions using light plates

sections.name: Strength
exercises: Barbell Bench Press — 5 sets x 8 reps @ moderate weight (rest 90 sec)
Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press — 3 sets x 12 reps @ 25 lbs (must remain seated for ceiling clearance)
Seated Dumbbell Lateral Raises — 3 sets x 15 reps @ 15 lbs

sections.name: Conditioning
exercises: Focus on nasal breathing and maintaining an upright posture throughout
